title: SEC During Inauguration of CIBN Bankers House Abuja
description: SEC During Inauguration of CIBN Bankers House Abuja LR: Pro – Chancellor, Achiever University Owo Ondo State, Dr. Bode Ayorinde,  Executive Commissioner Legal and Enforcement, Securities and Exc
html:
SEC During Inauguration of CIBN Bankers House Abuja

LR: Pro – Chancellor, Achiever University Owo Ondo State, Dr. Bode Ayorinde,  Executive Commissioner Legal and Enforcement, Securities and Exchange Commission, Mr. Reginald Karawusa, Registrar/Chief Executive, Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria, Mr. Seye Awojobi, President CIBN, Dr. Bayo Olugbemi, and Vice President, Prof Yemi Osinbajo, during the inauguration of Bankers House in Abuja. On Thursday  3/3/22
